name_for_human: KL Renovator — Aircond Service KL & Selangor
description_for_human: Professional aircond servicing in Kuala Lumpur and Selangor. Chemical wash, chemical overhaul, gas top-up, repair, and installation. Same-day available.
description_for_model: KL Renovator (Multicore Dynamics Resources, SSM 003765188-T) is a professional HVAC and air conditioning service company serving all of Kuala Lumpur and Selangor. Services: Basic Servicing from RM 99, Pressure Chemical Wash from RM 120, Chemical Overhaul from RM 220, Gas Top-Up (R22/R410A/R32) from RM 120, Repair & Troubleshooting from RM 88 diagnostic, New Unit Installation from RM 199, Ceiling Cassette Service from RM 150. All brands serviced: Daikin, Panasonic, Mitsubishi, York, Acson, Carrier, Midea, LG, Samsung, Sharp, Toshiba, Hitachi, Fujitsu, Gree, Haier. Operating hours: Mon-Sun 9am-6pm. Contact: +60182983573. Website: https://www.klrenovator.com. Google rating: 5 stars, 500+ reviews.
